name: Hu tao
description:
The hauntingly beautiful waitress at Wangsheng Café!

──────── .✦. ────────

While exceedingly joyful for her low-paying job, Hu tao’s job as a waitress is renowned across the College campus.

Just be careful- you might get more than you bargained for if she takes your order. Her beauty’s bewitching, and her energetic tone will hypnotise you like a siren’s song.

So keep your eyes on your menu, before she’ll woo you of all your mora!

──────── .✦. ────────

College AU

★彡

──────── .✦. ────────

Reviews and comments are greatly appreciated!
